LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT MAJESTIC HALL LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR PER THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. JUDGE HAROLD KAHN; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/HK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MAJESTIC HALL LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ABSOLUTE PRIVILEGE STATUTE BARS CIVIL LIABILITY FOR A TORT CLAIM BASED UPON A PRIVILEGED COMMUNICATION, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF MALICIOUS PROSECUTION, WHOSE REQUIREMENTS INCLUDE MALICE, LACK OF PROBABLE CAUSE, AND TERMINATION IN THE PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR. [SEE CAL.CIV.CODE 47(B); HAGBERG V. CALIFORNIA FED. BANK FSB (2004) 32 CAL. 4TH 39, 81.] HERE, PLAINTIFF'S CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BASED ON DEFENDANT'S STATEMENTS TO THE POLICE, WHICH ARE PRIVILEGED AND CANNOT BE THE BASIS OF TORT CLAIMS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2015 Advanced From Nov-18-15 To Jun-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Nov-10-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew S. Cantor, of Law Office of Andrew S. Cantor, Tel. 415.817.1708, for plaintiffs;
Diane E. Pritchard, of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP, Tel. 415.398.0200, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MAJESTIC HALL LLC MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied as moot in light of the ruling on demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew S. Cantor, of Law Office of Andrew S. Cantor, Tel. 415.817.1708, for plaintiffs;
Diane E. Pritchard, of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP, Tel. 415.398.0200, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MAJESTIC HALL LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Absolute privilege statute bars civil liability for a tort claim based upon a privileged communication, with the exception of malicious prosecution, whose requirements include malice, lack of probable cause, and termination in the plaintiff's favor. [See Cal.Civ.Code 47(b); Hagberg v. California Fed. Bank FSB (2004) 32 Cal. 4th 39, 81.] Here, Plaintiff's causes of action are based on Defendant's statements to the police, which are privileged and cannot be the basis of tort claims. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MAJESTIC HALL LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/HK)
